name: Powerline Classic
description: Agnoster-style powerline statusline with solid dark segments and right-arrow separators. Shows model, git branch, context usage, and session cost.
features: Classic Agnoster-style powerline arrows between segments
Segment 1: Model name on dark charcoal background
Segment 2: Git branch with staged/modified counts (gold text)
Segment 3: Context usage bar — color shifts with load (green/orange/red)
Segment 4: Session cost, duration, and lines changed
Smooth color transitions between all segments
